sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Looking at the current image, I see the same layout as before. The left bar is now black at the top left is now black (increased from 0). The green bar on the left is now gone. Let me check the current state to see what changed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for i, n in enumerate(nodes):
    if n['pixels'] <= 40 and n['color'] not in ['G', 'c', 'B']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        cr = (min(rows)+max(rows))//2
        cc = (min(cols)+max(cols))//2
        print(i, n['color'], n['pixels'], cr, cc)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
